final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial cinematic still of a post-apocalyptic wasteland scene featuring a heavily modified armored vehicle in a desolate desert.

Style/medium: photorealistic wide-format cinematic still, gritty post-apocalyptic aesthetic in the spirit of Mad Max: Fury Road production design
Composition: wide establishing shot, low horizon line, armored vehicle as mid-ground anchor, collapsed city ruins receding into the far background, slight low-angle to emphasize scale
Subject: heavily modified armored vehicle with welded scrap-metal plating, makeshift spikes and reinforced bumpers, battle-worn surface with rust and dust coating
Scene/backdrop: vast barren desert floor cracked and dry, distant collapsed urban ruins — toppled skyscrapers and crumbling concrete silhouettes barely visible through haze
Lighting/mood: oppressive ochre-yellow sky, diffused harsh sunlight filtered through thick airborne sand and dust, tense survivalist atmosphere, no clean shadows — everything softened by particulate haze
Color palette: dominant dirty amber and burnt sienna across sky and ground, desaturated rust-orange on the vehicle, pale grey ruins as receding value, no cool tones
Materials/textures: cracked desert hardpan with fine sand drifts, corroded welded metal with visible bolt heads and weld seams, dust-coated glass and rubber
Avoid: clean or pristine vehicle surfaces, blue sky, green vegetation, soft romantic lighting, lens flare stuffer, watermark
